gt_sql: SELECT T2.driverRef FROM qualifying AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 20 ORDER BY T1.q1 DESC LIMIT 5
pred_sql:
SELECT d.driverRef
FROM qualifying q
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE q.raceId = 20
ORDER BY q.q1 DESC
LIMIT 5;
question: Please list the reference names of the drivers who are eliminated in the first period in race number 20.
